description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white facade. The front of the house includes a small porch area, a main entry door, and large windows that allow natural light into the living spaces. A driveway runs along one side of the property, leading to a garage at the rear, with green landscaping strips bordering the driveway and the front yard. The house is set on a rectangular plot with a paved sidewalk and street in front, where two cars are parked. The rear of the house is more utilitarian, with garage doors and minimal window openings. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a side driveway leading to a rear garage, set on a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, porch, large windows, and two cars parked on the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, garage doors at the rear, and green landscaping along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage entrance, minimal windows, and the driveway extending to the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, flat roof, and the transition from the front porch to the rear garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows at the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, small porch, and minimal decorative elements
